title: quercus aurea
intro: Quercus aurea, also known as the Golden Oak, is a deciduous tree species native to eastern North America. The medicinal properties of Quercus aurea include its high tannin content, which has anti-inflammatory and astringent properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits associated with Quercus aurea include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Quercus aurea can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
